JavaScript test scripts for function behavior, object properties, variable conflicts, and argument handling.

## Folders
- **[13.01](13.01/README.md)**: Test function that returns true for any parameter.
- **[13.02](13.02/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for object property assignment, function properties, pass-by-value, and prototype checks.

## Files
- **[13-001.js](13-001.js.md)**: Tests the calculation of factorial for numbers 1 to 9 using a loop and an assertion.
- **[13-002.js](13-002.js.md)**: A test script that verifies the function `foo` returns 1.
- **[13-003.js](13-003.js.md)**: A test script that asserts a function returns 1 when called with specific parameters.
- **[13-004.js](13-004.js.md)**: Tests if the `foo` function is correctly identified as a function type.
- **[13-005.js](13-005.js.md)**: Tests variable and function name conflict resolution in JavaScript.
- **[13-006.js](13-006.js.md)**: Tests that the function `foo` returns `undefined`.
- **[13-007.js](13-007.js.md)**: A test script for a function that increments its argument by one.
- **[13-008.js](13-008.js.md)**: Tests the `foo` function to verify it returns the number of arguments passed to it.
- **[13-009.js](13-009.js.md)**: Tests variable and function hoisting behavior in JavaScript.
- **[13-010.js](13-010.js.md)**: Tests the assignment and execution of a function as a property of an object.
- **[13-011.js](13-011.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the `delete` operator on the non-configurable `arguments` object.
- **[13-012.js](13-012.js.md)**: Tests the deletion of function arguments and checks if they become undefined.
- **[13-013.js](13-013.js.md)**: A test script for verifying a function that returns its argument.
